expectations.text: Report states it audited at standards level because the stack is not JS/TS

notes: Exceeded expectations on evidence: traced python-jose 3.3.0 source to confirm require_exp defaults to False, making the missing-exp finding CONFIRMED rather than assumed. Found the same two out-of-catalog issues as the baseline (credentials as query params, bcrypt timing oracle) and correctly labeled them as outside the rule catalog. One gap vs baseline: did not surface python-jose's known CVEs; the skill's scope boundary excludes dependency CVEs, which may be too strict for the auth library itself.
